channel.title: Better Than Daily on VitaminDWiki
channel.description: Recent content in Better Than Daily on VitaminDWiki

item.title: Weekly, Monthly Vitamin D are typically better than daily - many studies
item.description:
Markdown:
--------


AST Structure:
-------------
├── DivNode
│   full_match: `{DIV(class="lefth4")}{maketoc Title=""}{DIV}`
│   inner_content: `{maketoc Title=""}`
│   attrs_dict:
│   │   raw_content: (class="lefth4")
│   │   class: lefth4
│   children:
│   ├── MakeTocNode
│   │   full_match: `{maketoc Title=""}`
│   │   inner_content: ``
│   │   attrs_dict:
│   │   │   raw_content:  Title=""
│   │   │   Title: ├── HorizontalRuleNode
│   full_match: `\n---\n`
│   inner_content: `---`├── HeadingNode
│   full_match: `!!!!VitaminDWiki – ((Better than Daily)) contains:`
│   inner_content: `VitaminDWiki – ((Better than Daily)) contains:`
│   level: `4`
│   children:
│   ├── TextNode
│   │   full_match: `VitaminDWiki – `
│   │   inner_content: `VitaminDWiki – `
│   ├── LocalLinkNode
│   │   full_match: `((Better than Daily))`
│   │   inner_content: `Better than Daily`
│   │   page: `Better than Daily`
│   │   children:
│   │   ├── TextNode
│   │   │   full_match: `Better than Daily`
│   │   │   inner_content: `Better than Daily`
│   ├── TextNode
│   │   full_match: ` contains:`
│   │   inner_content: ` contains:`├── TextNode
│   full_match: `\n`
│   inner_content: `\n`├── IncludeNode
│   full_match: `{include page="Better than Daily" start="~tc~ start ~/tc~" stop="~tc~ stop ~/tc~"}`
│   inner_content: ``
│   attrs_dict:
│   │   raw_content:  page="Better than Daily" start="~tc~ start ~/tc~" stop="~tc~ stop ~/tc~"
│   │   page: Better than Daily
│   │   start: ~tc~ start ~/tc~
│   │   stop: ~tc~ stop ~/tc~
│   children:
│   ├── TextNode
│   │   full_match: ``
│   │   inner_content: ``├── HorizontalRuleNode
│   full_match: `\n---\n`
│   inner_content: `---`├── HeadingNode
│   full_match: `!!!!~~#F00:122+~~ VitaminDWiki pages have MONTHLY in the title`
│   inner_content: `~~#F00:122+~~ VitaminDWiki pages have MONTHLY in the title`
│   level: `4`
│   children:
│   ├── ColorNode
│   │   full_match: `~~#F00:122+~~`
│   │   inner_content: `122+`
│   │   attrs_dict:
│   │   │   raw_content: #F00
│   │   children:
│   │   ├── TextNode
│   │   │   full_match: `122+`
│   │   │   inner_content: `122+`
│   ├── TextNode
│   │   full_match: ` VitaminDWiki pages have MONTHLY in the title`
│   │   inner_content: ` VitaminDWiki pages have MONTHLY in the title`├── TextNode
│   full_match: `\n`
│   inner_content: `\n`├── EmphasisNode
│   full_match: `''This list is automatically updated''`
│   inner_content: `This list is automatically updated`
│   children:
│   ├── TextNode
│   │   full_match: `This list is automatically updated`
│   │   inner_content: `This list is automatically updated`├── TextNode
│   full_match: `\n`
│   inner_content: `\n`├── ListNode
│   full_match: `{LIST()}\n{list max="150"}\n{filter field="title" content="MONTHLY"}\n{filter field="title" content="NOT \" not\""}\n{filter type="wiki page"}\n{sort mode="modification_date_major_desc"}\n{OUTPUT(template="table")}\n{tableparams allowtableexpansion="n" shownbitems="y" title=""}\n{column sort="title" label="Title" field="title" mode="raw"}{column}\n{column label="Modified" sort="modification_date_major" field="modification_date_major"}\n{OUTPUT}\n{FORMAT(name="title")}{display name=title format="objectlink"}{FORMAT}\n{FORMAT(name="modification_date_major")}{display name=modification_date_major format="date"}{FORMAT}\n{LIST}`
│   inner_content: `\n{list max="150"}\n{filter field="title" content="MONTHLY"}\n{filter field="title" content="NOT \" not\""}\n{filter type="wiki page"}\n{sort mode="modification_date_major_desc"}\n{OUTPUT(template="table")}\n{tableparams allowtableexpansion="n" shownbitems="y" title=""}\n{column sort="title" label="Title" field="title" mode="raw"}{column}\n{column label="Modified" sort="modification_date_major" field="modification_date_major"}\n{OUTPUT}\n{FORMAT(name="title")}{display name=title format="objectlink"}{FORMAT}\n{FORMAT(name="modification_date_major")}{display name=modification_date_major format="date"}{FORMAT}\n`
│   attrs_dict:
│   │   raw_content: 
│   children:
│   ├── TextNode
│   │   full_match: `\n{list max="150"}\n{filter field="title" content="MONTHLY"}\n{filter field="title" content="NOT \" not\""}\n{filter type="wiki page"}\n{sort mode="modification_date_major_desc"}\n{OUTPUT(template="table")}\n{tableparams allowtableexpansion="n" shownbitems="y" title=""}\n{column sort="title" label="Title" field="title" mode="raw"}{column}\n{column label="Modified" sort="modification_date_major" field="modification_date_major"}\n{OUTPUT}\n{FORMAT(name="title")}{display name=title format="objectlink"}{FORMAT}\n{FORMAT(name="modification_date_major")}{display name=modification_date_major format="date"}{FORMAT}\n`
│   │   inner_content: `\n{list max="150"}\n{filter field="title" content="MONTHLY"}\n{filter field="title" content="NOT \" not\""}\n{filter type="wiki page"}\n{sort mode="modification_date_major_desc"}\n{OUTPUT(template="table")}\n{tableparams allowtableexpansion="n" shownbitems="y" title=""}\n{column sort="title" label="Title" field="title" mode="raw"}{column}\n{column label="Modified" sort="modification_date_major" field="modification_date_major"}\n{OUTPUT}\n{FORMAT(name="title")}{display name=title format="objectlink"}{FORMAT}\n{FORMAT(name="modification_date_major")}{display name=modification_date_major format="date"}{FORMAT}\n`├── HorizontalRuleNode
│   full_match: `\n---\n`
│   inner_content: `---`├── HeadingNode
│   full_match: `!!!!~~#F00:221+~~ VitaminDWiki pages have WEEKLY in the title`
│   inner_content: `~~#F00:221+~~ VitaminDWiki pages have WEEKLY in the title`
│   level: `4`
│   children:
│   ├── ColorNode
│   │   full_match: `~~#F00:221+~~`
│   │   inner_content: `221+`
│   │   attrs_dict:
│   │   │   raw_content: #F00
│   │   children:
│   │   ├── TextNode
│   │   │   full_match: `221+`
│   │   │   inner_content: `221+`
│   ├── TextNode
│   │   full_match: ` VitaminDWiki pages have WEEKLY in the title`
│   │   inner_content: ` VitaminDWiki pages have WEEKLY in the title`├── TextNode
│   full_match: `\n`
│   inner_content: `\n`├── EmphasisNode
│   full_match: `''This list is automatically updated''`
│   inner_content: `This list is automatically updated`
│   children:
│   ├── TextNode
│   │   full_match: `This list is automatically updated`
│   │   inner_content: `This list is automatically updated`├── TextNode
│   full_match: `\n`
│   inner_content: `\n`├── ListNode
│   full_match: `{LIST()}\n{list max="300"}\n{filter field="title" content="WEEKLY"}\n{filter type="wiki page"}\n{sort mode="modification_date_major_desc"}\n{OUTPUT(template="table")}\n{tableparams allowtableexpansion="n" shownbitems="y" title=""}\n{column sort="title" label="Title" field="title" mode="raw"}{column}\n{column label="Modified" sort="modification_date_major" field="modification_date_major"}\n{OUTPUT}\n{FORMAT(name="title")}{display name=title format="objectlink"}{FORMAT}\n{FORMAT(name="modification_date_major")}{display name=modification_date_major format="date"}{FORMAT}\n{LIST}`
│   inner_content: `\n{list max="300"}\n{filter field="title" content="WEEKLY"}\n{filter type="wiki page"}\n{sort mode="modification_date_major_desc"}\n{OUTPUT(template="table")}\n{tableparams allowtableexpansion="n" shownbitems="y" title=""}\n{column sort="title" label="Title" field="title" mode="raw"}{column}\n{column label="Modified" sort="modification_date_major" field="modification_date_major"}\n{OUTPUT}\n{FORMAT(name="title")}{display name=title format="objectlink"}{FORMAT}\n{FORMAT(name="modification_date_major")}{display name=modification_date_major format="date"}{FORMAT}\n`
│   attrs_dict:
│   │   raw_content: 
│   children:
│   ├── TextNode
│   │   full_match: `\n{list max="300"}\n{filter field="title" content="WEEKLY"}\n{filter type="wiki page"}\n{sort mode="modification_date_major_desc"}\n{OUTPUT(template="table")}\n{tableparams allowtableexpansion="n" shownbitems="y" title=""}\n{column sort="title" label="Title" field="title" mode="raw"}{column}\n{column label="Modified" sort="modification_date_major" field="modification_date_major"}\n{OUTPUT}\n{FORMAT(name="title")}{display name=title format="objectlink"}{FORMAT}\n{FORMAT(name="modification_date_major")}{display name=modification_date_major format="date"}{FORMAT}\n`
│   │   inner_content: `\n{list max="300"}\n{filter field="title" content="WEEKLY"}\n{filter type="wiki page"}\n{sort mode="modification_date_major_desc"}\n{OUTPUT(template="table")}\n{tableparams allowtableexpansion="n" shownbitems="y" title=""}\n{column sort="title" label="Title" field="title" mode="raw"}{column}\n{column label="Modified" sort="modification_date_major" field="modification_date_major"}\n{OUTPUT}\n{FORMAT(name="title")}{display name=title format="objectlink"}{FORMAT}\n{FORMAT(name="modification_date_major")}{display name=modification_date_major format="date"}{FORMAT}\n`├── TextNode
│   full_match: `\n\n`
│   inner_content: `\n\n`├── TikiCommentNode
│   full_match: `~tc~ (alias(Monthly vitamin D is typically better than daily - many studies)) ~/tc~`
│   inner_content: ` (alias(Monthly vitamin D is typically better than daily - many studies)) `
│   children:
│   ├── TextNode
│   │   full_match: `(alias(Monthly vitamin D is typically better than daily - many studies)) `
│   │   inner_content: `(alias(Monthly vitamin D is typically better than daily - many studies)) `├── TextNode
│   full_match: `\n`
│   inner_content: `\n`├── TikiCommentNode
│   full_match: `~tc~ (alias(Weekly, Monthly Vitamin D is typically better than daily - many studies)) ~/tc~`
│   inner_content: ` (alias(Weekly, Monthly Vitamin D is typically better than daily - many studies)) `
│   children:
│   ├── TextNode
│   │   full_match: `(alias(Weekly, Monthly Vitamin D is typically better than daily - many studies)) `
│   │   inner_content: `(alias(Weekly, Monthly Vitamin D is typically better than daily - many studies)) `

Original Tiki:
-------------
{DIV(class="lefth4")}{maketoc Title=""}{DIV}
---
!!!!VitaminDWiki – ((Better than Daily)) contains:
{include page="Better than Daily" start="~tc~ start ~/tc~" stop="~tc~ stop ~/tc~"}
---
!!!!~~#F00:122+~~ VitaminDWiki pages have MONTHLY in the title
''This list is automatically updated''
{LIST()}
{list max="150"}
{filter field="title" content="MONTHLY"}
{filter field="title" content="NOT \" not\""}
{filter type="wiki page"}
{sort mode="modification_date_major_desc"}
{OUTPUT(template="table")}
   {tableparams allowtableexpansion="n" shownbitems="y" title=""}
    {column sort="title" label="Title" field="title" mode="raw"}{column}
    {column label="Modified" sort="modification_date_major" field="modification_date_major"}
{OUTPUT}
{FORMAT(name="title")}{display name=title format="objectlink"}{FORMAT}
{FORMAT(name="modification_date_major")}{display name=modification_date_major format="date"}{FORMAT}
{LIST}
---
!!!!~~#F00:221+~~ VitaminDWiki pages have WEEKLY in the title
''This list is automatically updated''
{LIST()}
{list max="300"}
{filter field="title" content="WEEKLY"}
{filter type="wiki page"}
{sort mode="modification_date_major_desc"}
{OUTPUT(template="table")}
   {tableparams allowtableexpansion="n" shownbitems="y" title=""}
    {column sort="title" label="Title" field="title" mode="raw"}{column}
    {column label="Modified" sort="modification_date_major" field="modification_date_major"}
{OUTPUT}
{FORMAT(name="title")}{display name=title format="objectlink"}{FORMAT}
{FORMAT(name="modification_date_major")}{display name=modification_date_major format="date"}{FORMAT}
{LIST}

~tc~ (alias(Monthly vitamin D is typically better than daily - many studies)) ~/tc~
~tc~ (alias(Weekly, Monthly Vitamin D is typically better than daily - many studies)) ~/tc~

item.title: Monthly vitamin D dosing better for children than daily (again)
item.description:
Monthly versus daily administration of vitamin D3 in children: a retrospective propensity score-matched study

Front Endocrinol (Lausanne) 2023 Oct 24:14:1265943. doi: 10.3389/fendo.2023.1265943

Jinjoo Choi # 1, Yunsoo Choe # 2, Seung Yang 1 3

Objectives: We aimed to evaluate the efficacy and safety of monthly vitamin D3 administration compared to a daily dosing regimen in healthy children with vitamin D deficiency.

Methods: This retrospective study included vitamin D deficient (serum 25-hydroxyvitamin D [25(OH)D] < 20 ng/mL) children with precocious puberty who received gonadotropin-releasing hormone agonist every 4 weeks between December 2019 and November 2022. We used propensity scores to 1:1 match daily (1,000 IU daily) and monthly (25,000 IU per 4 weeks) administration of vitamin D3 based on age, sex, body mass index Z-scores, season of blood collection, and baseline serum 25(OH)D concentrations.

item.title: Cancers reduced after 2 years of 2000 IU Vitamin D daily (2nd RCT) – RCT Aug
item.description:
VitaminDWiki summary

  • Some health problems, such as Cancers. take a long time to develop

  • The blood level of 2,000 IU of vitamin D taken daily takes over a year to plateau

  • The same blood level can be achieved in weeks if a loading dose is first taken

  • Note: P-53 is present in about 50% of those with digestive tract cancers

    • Thus about 50% fewer digestive tract cancer with 2,000 IU of vitamin D if ignore P-53

  • While over a million people have successfully used loading doses,

item.title: Vitamin D given daily, weekly, or monthly has similar response (116 RCTs) – meta-analysis
item.description:
Efficacy of intermittent versus daily vitamin D supplementation on improving circulating 25(OH)D concentration: a Bayesian network meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials

Front. Nutr., 24 August 2023 Vol 10 - 2023 | https://doi.org/10.3389/fnut.2023.1168115

Yan Zhuang1,2† Zhe Zhu3† Peihan Chi1,2 Haibo Zhou1,2 Zhicheng Peng1,2 Haoyue Cheng1,2 Xing Xin1,2 Wenliang Luo1,2 Shuting Si1,2 Minjia Mo1,2 Danqing Chen4 Hui Liu5* Yunxian Yu1,2*

  • 1 Dept of Public Health, Second Affiliated Hospital of Zhejiang U, School of Medicine, Hangzhou, China

item.title: Vitamin D response independent of dosing interval – meta-analysis
item.description:
Efficacy of intermittent versus daily vitamin D supplementation on improving circulating 25(OH)D concentration: A Bayesian network meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials

Front. Nutr.Sec. Nutritional Epidemiology Volume 10 - 2023 | doi: 10.3389/fnut.2023.1168115   PDF not available initially

Hui Liu1, 2* Haibo Zhou1 Zhicheng Peng1 Haoyue Cheng1 Peihan Chi1 Xing Xin1 Wenliang Luo1 Shuting Si1 Minjia Mo1 Danqing Chen1 Yunxian Yu1*

1 Zhejiang University, China

2 Sir Run run shaw hospital, China

NMOL achieved (reminder, need >2 months to get full response)

item.title: Depression is especially reduced by large intermittent doses of vitamin D – meta-analysis
item.description:
Efficacy and acceptability of vitamin D supplements for depressed patients: A systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials

Nutrition 2023 Jan 7;108:111968. doi: 10.1016/j.nut.2022.111968 PDFis behind a paywall

Maytinee Srifuengfung 1, Somporn Srifuengfung 2, Chalermsri Pummangura 2, Keerati Pattanaseri 1, Awirut Oon-Arom 3, Manit Srisurapanont 4

Objectives: This systematic review and meta-analysis synthesized the evidence from randomized controlled trials comparing vitamin D and placebo in reducing depressive symptoms and contributing to all-cause dropout rates.
